free_text: Elastic and inelastic scattering of 6Li + 18O versus
A self-supporting 900 mu-g/cm2 lithium target enriched
The dE-E telescope composed of a
30, 40 and 67 mu-m  dE- and 1 mm E-detectors.
The telescopes were positioned with an accuracy of
about 0.3 degree. The angular resolution in the lab
The beam energy spread on the target was about 0.5%.
Errors include both the statistical errors
and uncertainties from the spectrum fitting procedure.
